name: Xperi Inc.
description: Xperi Inc. is an American multinational technology company headquartered in San Jose, California, that develops software and intellectual property for consumer electronics, connected cars, and media platforms. The company invents, develops, and delivers technologies integrated into a wide variety of smart devices and entertainment systems worldwide. Operating through key business units, Xperi provides advanced audio solutions under the DTS brand, imaging innovations, and cutting-edge media platforms through TiVo. By seamlessly integrating its inventive technologies with partner products, Xperi powers extraordinary entertainment experiences for consumers at home and on the go.
